positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration of a roaring cosmic whale breaching through geometric constellations and nebulae. The whale should have clean, bold silhouettes and intricate patterns resembling celestial maps and fractal designs. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, vibrant magenta, electric cyan, and gold leaf accents. The composition should be highly symmetrical and central, designed for a seamless apparel print. Style: Neo-Victorian scientific illustration meets Psychedelic Art. Lighting: Dramatic, high contrast, backlit glow. Composition: Centered, repeating motif elements suggested in the background, perfect for a shirt print.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, lowres, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, ugly, cropped, tiling issues, clutter, noisy background, grain
